thread.title: Community Outreach with Commissioner Morey Wright: ‘Commissioner on Your Corner’
thread.title_full: Community Outreach with Commissioner Morey Wright: ‘Commissioner on Your Corner’

author: South Florida Caribbean News
title: Community Outreach with Commissioner Morey Wright: ‘Commissioner on Your Corner’
text:
[Local News](https://sflcn.com/category/local-news/)
Community Outreach with Commissioner Morey Wright: ‘Commissioner on Your Corner’
TAMARAC – District 2 Commissioner [Vice Mayor Morey Wright](https://sflcn.com/tamarac-city-commission-appoints-morey-wright-as-vice-mayor/) is excited to announce the launch of a new community outreach initiative, “Commissioner on Your Corner.” Designed to make local government more accessible to District 2 residents, this program offers an informal way for residents to meet and engage with their commissioner, ask questions and share their ideas for a better Tamarac.
Starting in November, Commissioner Morey Wright will visit six different communities within District 2 each month, providing an open space for dialogue, listening to concerns, and discussing collaborative ways to enhance the neighborhood.
The kick-off at Plum Bay on November 9 will start a series in District 2. This series will go to two other locations. It gives residents a chance to meet their local government representatives.
The next Commissioner on Your Corner will take place on Saturday, December 7, for the residents of Woodlands Section 1-8. Also, members of the Broward Sheriff’s Office executive staff and the Code Enforcement team will be present. They will address any community concerns.
Upcoming Locations:
- Saturday, December 7,
[Woodlands Blvd between White Hickory Circle and Bayberry Lane](https://4oa89z7ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fA1JGLEqhXgzr9ZL3LJTZSBLn50FH9vMYOQPXyA519x-qyIaqmxuEMZoGyaYY2WaMNOj9Fa7UjBBvNu5ToylphvkzYCgzEYZfO3JD9-HAmtrX00o12OBSwRz03w8jpZ80DwPHr66iiMAmPL9SSPHhLybnndSFMCILbxTlXAyMAZHgb_xhHpHJWTzWVb1ogoJgf61YiMjVWRmM-pa3Cdu5obvkzMShGAMqoHj7kWc1fdUbSi9YpSeygsJ3UVujZb_Yro7zgswxQ8c_QdkqfwIuKWewyzjB2GtxOcf3xf5bKiLvGttkCl1BAQbiYR5bPHY-qCM6sWSJVuiJ4uQXMEyJgbwQdcva5wmOEI6n25WPBYoilCBmp_pEZ8hMs_RHRPfVuJH6pZL7C37ldFRIvV9S4nTv0zfNyvDj6YIHh4SnkEHK88ppzo3ngHt6mhTmmKxUxm9Im1_1dylGNq6Y_hvB0uF14kTD7nf9nLFh98BL6Z-Tte2c-s4ezXYr6mdVooEWNuKhRtE1IdWDzh6jlvNU0O4P_CI_WoY7Xgomj4IZjsL2FXfJUvIToxky_Bpz99EgSHYqbKrrYUfvYlrbMDvXomO1wpmkXymWRAD9qPvKjYsFehMcC8tqXFMeF7D3171HqR9hxG7IAXKiBpA9JbV4uYnMZzt7LQ3dXKqIwbFi3r-LGw7LaTMjLWkuTw3Z9F_wgEJZBQpnD3LdIO2YMo3t96_C1205SX5pjTLGj7M7X5Qir3D_NXhGDuO69iLgroeQxvtRvWood17eNNPb0OqDTRRMgDkbwjS&c=SbXg0bYKg49K-uCOlrihwXWq86JG9CTa9VDK4kvwAmh1kIRMV_fqRw==&ch=x1QldlWtZ_ijDIk3GIIg31ZXWfu_Vpb6vygBiAxsdRnc9nu1cR-2QQ==) - Saturday, January 11, Lime Bay Clubhouse
Future dates will be announced for the Fairhaven, Greenhaven, Mainlands 8-9 and Hampton Hills communities.
Visit the [Commissioner on Your Corner](https://commissioneronyourcorner.my.canva.site/commissioneronyourcorner) website. There, you can find the full schedule and locations for the “Commissioner on Your Corner” series. District 2 residents are encouraged to take advantage of this opportunity to participate in the conversation about Tamarac’s future.
